user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 7 contains only restaurants and POIs (museum, walking tour) with no mentions of work commitments or flights.
Day 6 consists of family-friendly activities and dining (Toronto Islands, Aquarium) without any work or flight entries.
Day 9 is dedicated to brunch and shopping (Eaton Centre, Queen St West) with no work or flight commitments.
Day 8 is a full-day excursion to Niagara Falls, which is a leisure activity free of work or flights.
